error_signature: The name of the input field containing the binary file data must be set
title: Missing input field for binary file data in Google Drive upload
symptom: When attempting to upload a video to Google Drive, n8n throws an error stating that the input field for binary file data must be set.
applies_when: Uploading a file generated from an API
not_this_if: The video file is ready before the upload attempt
root_cause: The Google Drive node requires a specific input field name that corresponds to the binary data of the file being uploaded. If this field is not set correctly, the upload will fail.
fix_steps: Open the Google Drive node settings
In the 'Input Data Field Name', enter the name of the binary property from the previous node (usually 'data')
Set the 'File Name' to the desired filename
Specify the target folder if needed
agent_instruction: Ensure the 'Input Data Field Name' in the Google Drive node is set to the correct binary property name.
